title: Stir-Fried Stout Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful stir-fry recipe using locally-sourced stout vegetables. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Stout vegetables (such as broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers)

instructions: Heat the Algerian olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the crisp garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the stout vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they begin to soften.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet soy sauce and stir-fry seasoning.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve with rice or noodles, if desired.
Garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
